steps.title: Identify the parallel clause structures
steps.content: The first clause is “the word 'lasso' (a rope) comes from the Spanish word lazo”—an independent clause with a simple present verb. The and introduces a second independent clause with the same pattern: 'stockade' (a fence) __________ from estacada.

steps.title: Apply the parallelism rule
steps.content: The rule of parallelism requires parallel independent clauses to use the same verb tense. The first clause uses simple present (“comes”), so the second must also use simple present—”comes” in choice C. The other three options use different tenses, violating the parallelism requirement. That matches choice C — C is correct.
